# foundry_organization_role_assignments (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry OrganizationRoleAssignments.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "foundry_organization_role_assignments" "example" {
  organization_rid = "ri.foundry.main.organization.example-organization-rid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_rid` (String) RID of the Organization. (Required for data source lookup.)

### Read-Only

- `organization_role_assignments` (Set of Object) List of Role Assignments for this Organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--organization_role_assignments))

<a id="nestedatt--organization_role_assignments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `organization_role_assignments`

Read-Only:

- `principal_id` (String)
- `role_id` (String)
